pageContext.name: The Phantom Knight (Hell Chamber)
pageContext.description: Made predominantly of porcelain and boasting an accurate likeness to Rob Bowyer's artwork 'Kill Them All' comes The Phantom Knight (Hell Chamber).  The Phantom Knight (Hell Chamber) is a piece of functional art. Featuring high gloss painted porcelain, the incense chamber has a weathered grey palette and features a removable base for easy cleaning.  Artfully placed openings allow smoke to rise out of the brawny silhouette, accentuating the ethereal look and feel of The Phantom Knight (Hell Chamber).
